summary: Iteration 53: Solomon Chat Competitor Knowledge Testing. Backend: 8/10 tests passed (80%). Competitor knowledge successfully loaded (30,516 chars) and injected into Solomon Chat. LLM budget exceeded during testing, limiting full test coverage. All tested competitor knowledge features working correctly.

minor.issue: LLM budget exceeded (Current cost: 2.035206, Max budget: 2.0) - external limitation, not code issue

competitor_knowledge_loading.details: Backend logs confirm: '[Solomon AI] Loaded competitor knowledge base: 30,516 chars'. Knowledge file at /app/planning_center_transcripts/competitor_knowledge_combined.txt loads at startup.

planning_center_knowledge.details: Solomon correctly answers questions about Planning Center Calendar, Services, People, Groups, and Giving features. Mentions specific features like events, rooms, resources, booking, approval, conflict detection.

securegive_knowledge.details: Solomon correctly answers questions about SecureGive pricing (Basic $149, Premium $299, Enterprise), kiosks ($1,199-$5,799), and transaction fees (1.75-2.5% + $0.30).

pushpay_knowledge.details: Solomon correctly answers questions about Pushpay contract requirements (1-3 year contracts required).

migration_questions.details: Solomon provides helpful migration guidance including CSV import/export, data transfer, and hands-on migration support.

pricing_comparison.details: Solomon correctly compares pricing: Planning Center $300-$500+/mo for all products vs Solomon AI $99-$2,999 all-inclusive.

respectful_competitor_handling.details: Solomon is respectful about competitors, using phrases like 'solid, proven platform' and 'served churches well for 20 years'. No bashing language detected.

normal_church_questions.details: Non-migration questions (giving, service times, groups) still work correctly with helpful responses.

api_validation.details: Empty message validation works (returns 400 error). Session ID returned correctly in responses. Chat works with and without authentication.

critical_code_review_comments: Competitor knowledge injection working correctly - 30,516 chars loaded from /app/planning_center_transcripts/competitor_knowledge_combined.txt
System prompt includes detailed migration instructions and competitor comparison guidelines
Solomon Chat responses are knowledgeable, specific, and respectful about competitors
All 5 demo curl tests from main agent verified: Planning Center features, SecureGive pricing, Pushpay contracts, migration guidance, pricing comparison

success_rate.backend: 80% (8/10 tests passed - 2 tests hit LLM budget limit)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing competitor knowledge file
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified Solomon Chat competitor knowledge injection. The competitor_knowledge_combined.txt file (30,516 chars) loads at startup and is injected into the system prompt. Solomon correctly answers questions about Planning Center (all 9 products), SecureGive (pricing, kiosks, fees), and Pushpay (contracts, ChurchStaq). Responses are respectful and professional. LLM budget was exceeded during testing ($2.035 of $2.0 limit) - this is an external limitation. All core competitor knowledge features verified working.
